dataList.name: Causality that Threads the Past, the Present, and the Future [三世因果]
dataList.desc: At 10+ Clashes against the same target, randomly gain or lose Clash Power by (Clash Count / 10) in a Clash (rounded down) Encounter Start: - Begin Encounter with the same ХП as Butterfly[TabExplain] of Entangled Lives::The Pupa (excluding Shield) - Gain 10 Stacks each of [StackPastActivate] / [StackPresentActivate] / [StackFutureActivate] At less than 66%/33% ХП, gain new Slot patterns - When this unit's ХП drops below 66%/33% for the first time in this Encounter, gain 10 Stacks each of [StackPastActivate], [StackPresentActivate], and [StackFutureActivate] на следующий ход

dataList.name: Moment of Entangled Lives
dataList.desc: Начало хода: Activate the highest-Stacked state of time between [StackPastActivate], [StackPresentActivate], and [StackFutureActivate] and use a special Skill - If multiple states of time share the highest Stack, the currently active state of time does not change - Inactive states of time become [StackPast], [StackPresent], or [StackFuture], respectively - When the currently active state of time changes, gain 1 [TimeGap] Every time Illusory Butterfly[TabExplain] of Entangled Lives::The Past / The Present / The Future are hit as main targets, Butterfly[TabExplain] of Entangled Lives::Imago loses [StackPastActivate] / [StackPresentActivate] / [StackFutureActivate] Stack Higher [StackPastActivate] / [StackPresentActivate] / [StackFutureActivate] Stacks lead to Butterfly[TabExplain] of Entangled Lives::Imago's Skill Power and damage output becoming greatly enhanced, and greatly increase the amount of status effects it inflicts or gains

dataList.name: Life Hanging on a Wedge [一櫼之命]
dataList.desc:
Encounter Start: Gain 3 [YesdragonSelfRefraction]
Конец хода: Gain 1 [YesdragonSelfRefraction] на следующий ход
Gain +1 more [YesdragonSelfRefraction] from this effect every time the "Thundering Wrath" Passive triggers

dataList.name: Thundering Wrath [震怒]
dataList.desc:
The Inverted Scale Part takes damage only from Skills that it is the main target of; does not take damage from any other sources
When the Inverted Scale Part is hit, remove the Inverted Scale Part from the Skill Slots на следующий ход; gain 1 [AttackUp] and 1 [DefenseDown] за каждые [YesdragonSelfRefraction] Stack consumed by the "Wrath of the Inverted Scale" Skill

dataList.name: Dragon's Scale
dataList.desc:
Unaffected by [Agility] and [Binding]
Take -50% ХП damage from [Combustion], [Laceration:*Кетчупа*], [Vibration], [Burst:*Зелёнки*] , and [Sinking:*Депрессии*] ; -50% to Stagger Threshold raised by [Vibration]

dataList.desc:

Does not lose Shield at Turn End
When the Shield is broken, enter a new phase

dataList.name: Tarnished Body
dataList.desc:
All Parts become Breakable and Unseverable
Broken Parts regenerate in 3 turns with 30% ХП

dataList.name: Life Hanging on a Wedge [一櫼之命]
dataList.desc: Cannot be killed as long as the Flower-burying Wedge Part isn't broken

dataList.desc:
When the Inverted Scale Part is broken, the "Thundering Wrath" Passive does not activate
While the Inverted Scale Part is broken, all Parts gain 3 [AttackUp] and 6 [DefenseDown]

dataList.name: Broken Skull
dataList.desc: While the Head part is broken, all Parts gain 2 [Vulnerable] every turn

- When the Inverted Scale is broken, reset the increased [YesdragonSelfRefraction] gain

When the Inverted Scale Part is hit, remove the Inverted Scale Part from the Skill Slots на следующий ход; gain 1 [AttackUp] and 1 [DefenseDown] за каждые [YesdragonSelfRefraction] Stack consumed by the "Wrath of the Inverted Scale" Skill

dataList.desc:
Начало хода: Gain Shield equal to 300% of the Core's макс. ХП
- This effect does not trigger when Attack Skills are equipped
Начало хода: When Staggered, recover from Stagger

dataList.name: The Dragon's Bleeding Vein
dataList.desc:
When hit, apply [YesdragonPower] on the attacker на следующий ход

On death, immediately apply [YesdragonPower] on all Sinners

dataList.name: One Last Radiance [回光返照]
dataList.desc:
When this unit takes damage that brings its ХП down to 0, this unit's ХП does not drop below 1 for the turn; recover from Stagger due to damage
For the rest of the turn, this unit cannot be Staggered or killed due to damage; then, use "Impale the Self, Impurity[TabExplain] to Purge" at the very end of that turn

dataList.name: Lofty Energy
dataList.desc:
This unit cannot be subject to healing or Assist Defense[TabExplain] effects
Take damage only from Skills that this unit is the main target of; does not take damage from any other sources

dataList.name: Refracted Egress
dataList.desc: Cannot Retreat

dataList.name: Return to Origin [物歸原主]
dataList.desc: When hit by Yinglong's "Levinfall" Skill, die instantly and apply 1 [YesdragonSelfRefraction] on Yinglong

dataList.name: Rien, The Index Nursefather
dataList.desc: Take -50% damage from Unopposed Attacks Take -50% damage from [Combustion], [Laceration:*Кетчупа*], [Vibration], [Burst:*Зелёнки*] , and [Sinking:*Депрессии*] When healing IQ from [UnlockBuff_Base], if this unit's IQ is below 15, хилит IQ up to 15 Encounter Start: Gain [BurningWoundRien_Mask] and хилит IQ up to 45 At 55%- ХП, end the turn and gain a new pattern - Remove all effects other than those exclusive to this unit - Change [StackRienSpecialSkill] Stack to 0
dataList.flavor:
I waited for "the moment" as the Prescript told me to.
Even after my darling daughter left, I waited.

And after a while, I was contacted by Limbus Company, and saw that the Backdoor was open.
That's when the device beeped and let me know that it was finally time to bring my daughter home.

dataList.name: Oracle Device [Caduceus]
dataList.desc: A random weapon is assigned to every Coin. Each weapon has a unique effect. - [RienWeapon01Hatchet] - [RienWeapon02Stiletto] - [RienWeapon03Greatsword] - [RienWeapon04Rapier] - [RienWeapon05Sledgehammer] - [RienWeapon06Ultragreatsword] - [RienWeapon07Lance] - [RienWeapon08Chain] - [RienWeapon09Scythe] When using an Attack Skill, gain 1 [StackRienSpecialSkill] (макс. 9) - Can be gained once per Skill; does not gain Stack from the same Skill twice Начало хода: At 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill] Stacks, use a powerful Skill - Attack End: After using the powerful Skill for the first time, gain [Shin_Rien] - Reset the per-Skill [StackRienSpecialSkill] cap - Min & макс. Speed +15 - Конец хода: Gain 1 [Vulnerable] and 2 [ResultReduction] на следующий ход Turn 4 Start after entering the field: At less than 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill], bring its Stack to 9; then, gain (Stack gained x 3) [KarmaOfIndexRien] - Then, activate this effect every 4 turns
dataList.flavor:
A vial of what looks like liquid metal capable of changing its shape and mass, its qualities almost like those of Singularities, swishes inside the Device.
The form the fluid takes is contingent on the Prescript the Device receives. The weapons it produces depend on the information regarding the target and the time limit given to carry out the assassination.
One day, as he received a dagger too small for the task, he elected to wait until it produced a different weapon. However, despite the approaching deadline, it refused to provide him a proper weapon; he had no choice but to kill his target with a fork.

dataList.name: Will of the Prescript
dataList.desc: Начало хода: - Gain [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] based on [UnlockBuff_Base] stage on self - Apply [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] against a random Sinner, and prioritize attacking them - When using a Skill against [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], convert all Coins on that Skill to [SuperCoin]s When attacking, if [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] is killed, or if this unit can no longer attack that target, use the remaining Skills against a random Sinner - Prioritizes targets with the lowest current ХП, unless they have 1 ХП - When the randomly chosen Sinner is killed, or if the said Sinner's ХП is brought down to 1, repeat this effect on another Sinner Deal +2.5% damage against [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] за каждые [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (макс. 20%) - At 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], deal +30% damage against all targets
dataList.flavor:
Do you wish me to raise a family?

"It must've been fate that brought us together. To think that I'd ever meet a husband like you..."

dataList.name: Undertake Prescript
dataList.desc: Конец хода: If [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was executed this turn, хилит 10 IQ and gain 3 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (один раз за ход) Конец хода: If [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was not executed this turn, gain 8 [KarmaOfIndexRien] - If this unit does not have [UnlockBuff_Base], gain 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] at Turn End - At 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], does not gain [KarmaOfIndexRien]
dataList.flavor:
Do you wish me to lose my family?

"Honey, I gotta take a quick trip up north today."
"Ah, also—hey, buddy. I'm expecting a package this afternoon, so would you be a dear and pick it up for me, sweetheart?"

dataList.name: Unlock
dataList.desc:
Конец хода: At 3/6/9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] or at 95%-/85%-/75%- ХП,- Gain [UnlockBuff_Rien1]/[UnlockBuff_Rien2]/[UnlockBuff_Rien3]

Turn 1 End after entering the field: At lower than [UnlockBuff_Base] stage 1, gain [UnlockBuff_Rien1]
Turn 3 End after entering the field: At lower than [UnlockBuff_Base] stage 2, gain [UnlockBuff_Rien2]

When [UnlockBuff_Base] is activated due to ХП or Turn conditionals:
- At less than 3/6/9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] Stack, raise them to 3/6/9
Gain 5 [KarmaOfIndexRien] at the на следующий ход Start за каждые Stack gained
dataList.flavor: "Following the Prescripts is to unlock what is locked."

dataList.name: Fixed Panic
dataList.desc:
Apply the [PanicChangeLock] effect
Конец хода: If this unit is in Panic, raise IQ to 15

dataList.name: Rien, the Father [Imitation]
dataList.desc: Take -75% damage from Unopposed Attacks Take -75% damage from [Combustion], [Laceration:*Кетчупа*], [Vibration], [Burst:*Зелёнки*] , and [Sinking:*Депрессии*] When healing IQ from [UnlockBuff_Base], if this unit's IQ is below 30, хилит up to 30 IQ When this unit enters a new phase at 55% ХП, gain the following effects: - Remove all effects other than those exclusive to this unit - Reset [StackRienSpecialSkill] Stack to 0 - Gain [IndexPrescript_RienSecondPhase] - Convert [BurningWoundRien_Mask] to [BurningWoundRien] - Convert [KarmaOfIndexRien] to [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase]; then gain 10 Stacks of that effect - If this unit does not have [Shin_Rien], immediately gain that effect At 25% or lower ХП, gain a new pattern and greatly enhance a certain Skill
dataList.flavor:
Once, he harbored a suspicion that he was being shaped into an imitation of someone; he doubted the Will and nearly defied it, for he did not know whom he was to mimic. Only when it was too late did he understand its intent and come to accept the Prescript's will.
Only then was the false father completed.

dataList.name: Oracle Device [Caduceus] - Full Unlock
dataList.desc: A random weapon is assigned to every Coin. Each weapon has a unique effect. - [RienWeapon01Hatchet2phase] - [RienWeapon02Stiletto2phase] - [RienWeapon03Greatsword2phase] - [RienWeapon04Rapier2phase] - [RienWeapon05Sledgehammer2phase] - [RienWeapon06Ultragreatsword2phase] - [RienWeapon07Lance2phase] - [RienWeapon08Chain2phase] - [RienWeapon09Scythe2phase] When using an Attack Skill, gain 1 [StackRienSpecialSkill] (макс. 9) - Can be gained once per Skill; does not gain Stack from the same Skill twice - Does not gain Stack from a Skill used only in a special pattern Начало хода: At 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill] Stacks, use a powerful Skill - Reset the per-Skill [StackRienSpecialSkill] cap - Min & макс. Speed +15 - Конец хода: Gain 2 [Vulnerable] and 3 [ResultReduction] на следующий ход Activate the following, starting from the turn in which the phase changed - Every 3 turns, at less than 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill], bring its Stack to 9; then, gain (Stack gained x 5) [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase]
dataList.flavor: An unparalleled weapon and a curse bestowed by Hermes, a god of the City whose Prescripts are distributed by radio waves.

dataList.name: Will of the Prescript
dataList.desc: Начало хода: - Apply [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] against a random Sinner, and prioritize attacking them - When using a Skill against [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], convert all Coins on that Skill to [SuperCoin]s - Gain [Protection] equal to [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (макс. 9) - Lose 1 Stack за каждые 20 [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase] When attacking, if [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] is killed, or if this unit can no longer attack that target, use the remaining Skills against a random other Sinner - Prioritizes targets with the lowest current ХП, unless they have 1 ХП - When the randomly chosen Sinner is killed, or if the said Sinner's ХП is brought down to 1, repeat this effect on another Sinner Deal +5% damage against [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] за каждые [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (макс. 40%) - At 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], deal +50% damage against all targets Starting from the first turn after the phase change, activate the following effects: - Начало хода: Gain [BlackNightmare] · If this unit used a powerful attack in the previous turn, lose [BlackNightmare] for that turn
dataList.flavor:
I raised a family.

"You're not supposed to be here right now."
"My work is still much underway, and I'd like to carve them up in peace so they can attain the most exquisite beauty I can sculpt."
"... Don't tell me, are you here to defy the Prescript?"

dataList.name: Undertake Prescript
dataList.desc: Конец хода: If [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was executed this turn, хилит 15 IQ and gain 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (один раз за ход) Конец хода: If [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was not executed this turn, gain 8 [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase] and lose 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] - If this unit used a powerful Skill this turn, gain 12 [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase] and lose 2 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] instead
dataList.flavor:
I... lost my family.

"Don't go..."
"Don't go... Not... like this... Daddy... Please... help us..."

dataList.name: Fixed Panic
dataList.desc:
Apply the [PanicChangeLock] effect
Конец хода: If this unit is in Panic, raise IQ to 30

dataList.name: Fixed Panic
dataList.desc:
Apply the [PanicChangeLock] effect
Конец хода: If this unit is in Panic, raise IQ to 45

dataList.name: Let's Play Tag! Here I Go!
dataList.desc: Начало хода: If there are no [TagGameBuff]s, this unit's 1/2/3 other allies that have the lowest Level become [TagGameBuff] for 3 turns (number of units receiving this effect increases every time this effect activates) If [TagGameBuff] effect expires while the unit that had the [TagGameBuff] effect is alive, gain the following effects: - All Sinners take fixed damage equal to 40% ХП each - Reduce IQ to -45 for a random Sinner who can enter E.G.O Corrosion[TabExplain] or Panic If a Sinner kills a [TagGameBuff], the said Sinner gains 1 [ResultEnhancement] for the rest of this Encounter (this effect can be gained cumulatively)

dataList.name: Will You Play? Will You Play? Will You Play?
dataList.desc: Конец хода: If this unit is the only surviving ally, or if the Core is at 50%- ХП, use "Let's Play Together Forever~!" на следующий ход (once per Encounter)

dataList.name: No More Playtime
dataList.desc: Начало хода: The "Stuffed Toy" Part gains [Protection] equal to the number of allies excluding this unit When the "Stuffed Toy" Part is destroyed, Will You Play? and its remaining allies are killed

dataList.name: Attachment Plushie
